summary: Misfiled issue: reporter is using the skia-canvas Node.js npm package (JavaScript ctx.measureText API), not SkiaSharp (.NET). Reporter confirmed filing in the wrong repo.

stepsToReproduce: Reporter uses skia-canvas npm package v2.0.2 (Node.js), not SkiaSharp
Reporter calls ctx.measureText(fullText, 952) — JavaScript Canvas API, not SkiaSharp API
No C# code provided — only template placeholders
Reporter commented: 'Sorry, I just sent wrong place'
reproEvidence.environmentDetails: skia-canvas npm package ^2.0.2, VS Code on macOS

analysis.summary: This issue is about the skia-canvas npm package (a Node.js library), not SkiaSharp (a .NET library). The reporter uses ctx.measureText() which is a JavaScript Canvas API, not SkiaSharp's SKFont.MeasureText() or SKPaint.MeasureText(). The reporter confirmed the mistake in a follow-up comment.
analysis.rationale: The issue references 'skia-canvas' version '^2.0.2' (an npm package), uses JavaScript API ctx.measureText(), provides no C# code, and the reporter self-identified filing in the wrong repo. This is not actionable for SkiaSharp.

codeInvestigation.finding: SkiaSharp's MeasureText API is SKFont.MeasureText(string) returning float, completely different from the JavaScript ctx.measureText() the reporter uses. Confirms this is a different project.
SKPaint.MeasureText overloads also use .NET types (string, ReadOnlySpan, IntPtr). No overlap with the JavaScript API described in the issue.

keySignals.interpretation: skia-canvas is a Node.js npm package, not SkiaSharp
JavaScript Canvas API call, not SkiaSharp API

keySignals.text: Sorry , I just sent wrong place
keySignals.interpretation: Reporter acknowledges filing in the wrong repository

actionability.reason: Issue is about skia-canvas (Node.js npm package), not SkiaSharp (.NET). Reporter confirmed misfiling.

actions.description: Redirect reporter to the correct repository
actions.comment:
Thanks for the follow-up — no worries! As you noted, this issue is about the [skia-canvas](https://github.com/nicestflame/skia-canvas) Node.js package, not SkiaSharp (.NET). You'll want to file this in the skia-canvas repository instead.

Closing as misfiled.

actions.description: Close as misfiled — not a SkiaSharp issue
